fields.summary: Returns all design coordinates for the specified named instance.
fields.returns: An array of design coordinate values for the named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.summary: Reads design coordinates for the specified named instance into a caller-supplied buffer.
fields.returns: The number of design coordinates written into <paramref name="coords" />.

params.coords: The buffer to receive the design coordinate values.
params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

entries.signature: public int GetNamedInstanceDesignCoords (int instanceIndex, Span<float> coords);

fields.summary: Returns the number of design coordinates for the specified named instance.
fields.returns: The total number of design coordinates associated with the named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name ID for the PostScript name of the specified named instance.
fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the PostScript name of the named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name ID for the subfamily name of the specified named instance.
fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the subfamily name of the named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name ID for the display name of the specified palette color entry.
fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the color entry name.

params.colorIndex: The zero-based index of the palette color entry.

fields.summary: Returns all colors in the specified palette as an array.
fields.returns: An array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values for the palette, using BGRA byte ordering (<c>0xBBGGRRAA</c>).

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette.

fields.summary: Reads colors from the specified palette into a caller-supplied buffer.
fields.returns: The number of colors written into <paramref name="colors" />.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette.
params.colors: The buffer to receive the color values.

entries.signature: public int GetPaletteColors (int paletteIndex, Span<HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor> colors);

fields.summary: Returns the flags associated with the specified color palette.
fields.returns: A <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeColorPaletteFlags" /> value describing the palette characteristics.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette.

fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name ID for the display name of the specified color palette.
fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> for the palette name.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the color palette.

fields.summary: Reads variation axis information into a caller-supplied buffer.
fields.returns: The number of axis entries written into <paramref name="axes" />.

params.axes: The buffer to receive the variation axis information.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains COLR color layer data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has a COLR table with color layer data; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains PNG color bitmap data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has a CBDT or sbix table with PNG glyph bitmaps; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains SVG color glyph data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has an SVG table; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains OpenType color palette data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has a CPAL table; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the face contains OpenType variable font data.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the face has an fvar table; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets the number of named instances defined in the variable font.
fields.value: The count of named instances, or zero if the face is not a variable font.

fields.summary: Gets the number of color palettes defined in the font.
fields.value: The count of CPAL palettes, or zero if the face has no palette data.

fields.summary: Attempts to find a variation axis by its four-byte tag.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the axis was found; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.axisInfo: When this method returns, contains the axis information if the tag was found. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.
params.tag: The four-byte tag identifying the variation axis.

entries.signature: public bool TryFindVariationAxis (HarfBuzzSharp.Tag tag, out HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo axisInfo);

fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined in the variable font.
fields.value: The count of variation axes, or zero if the face is not a variable font.

fields.summary: Gets all variation axis information for the variable font.
fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo" /> values describing each variation axis, or an empty array if the face is not a variable font.
